commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=92ef7775384690e129a061ae8926543ffe6ecbac)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bounded same-profile retry/backoff for overloaded embedded-agent provider failures, updates prompt/assistant failover tests, and adds a new trace attempt result.

PR surface: Source +85, Tests +179. Total +264 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the new prompt exhaustion test expects a raw overloaded_error after two attempts, while the assistant path can return a structured FailoverError with status 503. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor and maintainer handling because proof is insufficient and the default retry/backoff plus prompt exhaustion behavior need review before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): retry transient provider errors when single profile has no fallback
target.body:
## Summary

- Rebase the existing overloaded-failover fix onto the current embedded-agent runner paths.
- Bound no-fallback same-profile overload handling to one retry with backoff for both prompt-side and assistant-side failures.
- Keep non-overload failures on the existing surface/fallback paths and add exhaustion coverage for the bounded retry behavior.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** When a single configured auth profile has no model fallback and the provider returns an overloaded error, the embedded runner now performs one bounded same-profile retry with backoff and then surfaces a 503 overload error if the next attempt is still overloaded.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw gateway from the current PR worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-84265`, isolated `OPENCLAW_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-dev-247304`, channels skipped, DeepSeek-backed OpenAI provider auto-enabled.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** `OPENCLAW_REPO=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-84265 OPENCLAW_LOG=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-84265-evidence/openclaw-dev-gateway-after-final-rebase.log /media/vdc/code/ai/Hermes/.claude/skills/daily-fix/scripts/start_openclaw_dev_gateway.sh`
- **Evidence after fix:** `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-84265-evidence/openclaw-start-after-final-rebase.log` shows `GATEWAY READY`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-pr-84265-evidence/openclaw-dev-gateway-after-final-rebase.log` shows `agent model: openai/deepseek-chat`, `http server listening`, and `ready` for the current worktree.
- **Observed result after fix:** The gateway started successfully from the rebased PR code and reached ready state on `127.0.0.1:19001`. Focused E2E coverage also verifies same-profile overloaded assistant and prompt retries are capped after one retry.
- **What was not tested:** A live third-party provider outage was not reproduced in an external chat channel.

## Regression Test Plan

- **Target test file:** `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/assistant-failover.test.ts`, `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/failover-policy.test.ts`, `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.run-embedded-agent.auth-profile-rotation.e2e.test.ts`
- `pnpm run lint:tmp:no-raw-channel-fetch`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 pnpm exec node scripts/test-projects.mjs test/vitest/vitest.agents-embedded-agent.config.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.run-embedded-agent.auth-profile-rotation.e2e.test.ts --reporter=verbose`

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The no-fallback overloaded path reused the generic run-loop budget after same-profile retry was introduced, so persistent overloaded responses could keep retrying the same provider before surfacing. The retry cap is scoped to overloaded failures; rate-limit, auth, billing, and other provider failures keep their existing surface or fallback behavior.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
